text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the day of the Arima Kinen. Gold City
shrugs off compliments about her looks with an
air of resignation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, Tamamo Cross appears ecstatic in the
paddock. This is the showdown she's been
craving. But after seeing Gold City's lack of
motivation, she grows irritated.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold City heads into the race all the same,
believing that just maybe there's still a chance her
reputation can be changed.
